text.title: ab-testing-setup Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ab-testing-setup as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using fixed-horizon sample-size math and then analyzing with sequential testing tools.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The two frameworks have different stopping rules; mixing them produces invalid confidence intervals.
